Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. for plaintiff Community Housing Partnership with property manager, Barbara Leahy present.
C.J. Kingsley, Esq. appearing on limited scope representation for defendant, Leilani Dawson, who is also present.

This cause came on regularly this date for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. Case settled. Parties entered into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or for Dismissal of Action with Prejudice. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1220 Bayside Drive, Unit B, San Francisco, CA.

JPT Ernst Halperin, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
